title: Verify the presence of the 'PICK A DATE' button
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button.
expected_result: The 'PICK A DATE' button is visible and accessible.

title: Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button and verify navigation
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button.
expected_result: The application navigates to a new screen where users can select a holiday date.

title: Verify the 'PICK A DATE' button is clickable
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Attempt to click on the 'PICK A DATE' button.
expected_result: The 'PICK A DATE' button responds to a click by navigating to a new screen.

title: Verify the 'PICK A DATE' button is accessible
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Use accessibility tools to interact with the 'PICK A DATE' button.
expected_result: The 'PICK A DATE' button is accessible through accessibility tools.

title: Verify the 'PICK A DATE' button is usable
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Attempt to click on the 'PICK A DATE' button.
expected_result: The 'PICK A DATE' button is usable and navigates the user to the correct screen.

title: Verify the 'PICK A DATE' button is responsive
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button multiple times.
expected_result: The 'PICK A DATE' button is responsive and navigates the user to the correct screen each time.

title: Verify the 'PICK A DATE' button is persistent
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Navigate away from the current screen and return to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button.
expected_result: The 'PICK A DATE' button is persistent and navigates the user to the correct screen upon return.

title: Verify the 'PICK A DATE' button is responsive to interruptions
test_steps: Open the application and navigate to the screen with the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Click on the 'PICK A DATE' button. | Simulate an interruption such as a phone call or notification.
expected_result: The 'PICK A DATE' button is responsive to interruptions and navigates the user to the correct screen upon return.
